subject: Review MIN_PERIODS threshold for non-CSD categories
description: Check pre_*_3_filter_series.py for Danskvand/Energidrikke/RTD/Totalbeer. Danskvand/RTD have 39 periods, Energidrikke/Totalbeer have 41. Lower DEFAULT_MIN_PERIODS if set to 40 so brands pass the filter. Files: thesis/data/_02_preprocessing/nielsen/{category}/pre_*_3_filter_series.py.
